headline: DG Matrix and Satterfield & Pontikes Partner to Accelerate Optimized AI Data Center Construction in Texas
summary: HOUSTON & MORRISVILLE, N.C., May 07, 2026--DG Matrix, the global leader in solid-state transformer solutions, and Satterfield & Pontikes Construction (S&P), the ENR Top 400 general contractor with offices across Texas, today announced a strategic partnership to integrate DG Matrix's Interport™ solid-state transformer (SST) platform into S&P's builds as the general contractor expands its multi-GW data center construction business.

headline: S&P Global Energy Expands Cement, Clinker and SCM Price Assessment Coverage to Meet Demand from Global Construction and Decarbonisation Markets

headline: Is S&P Global (SPGI) Still A Compelling Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether S&P Global at around US$423 per share is offering fair value or a potential opportunity, it helps to line up the recent share performance against a clear valuation framework. The stock is down 2.2% over the past week, 2.4% over the past month, and 17.4% year to date, with a 15.6% decline over the last year. However, longer term returns of 19.8% over three years and 19.4% over five years highlight a mixed picture for investors. Recent coverage around S&P Global...
